metadata.title: Segura®, formerly senhasegura - The Complete Identity Security Platform
metadata.description: Protecting and controlling the use of generic and high privilege credentials, providing secure storage, access segregation and full traceability of use.

topBanner.cta: Get to Know Our New Brand

item1.title: Secure Privileged Access
item1.desc: Discover, manage, protect, and audit privileged accounts and sessions.

item2.title: Endpoint Privilege Management
item2.desc: Just-in-time and on-demand endpoint privilege management and elevation.

item3.title: Multi-Cloud Identity Security
item3.desc: Secure access to cloud consoles and services across multi-cloud environments.

item4.title: DevOps Secrets Management
item4.desc: Secrets management for applications, databases, CI/CD tools, and services.

item1.title: Certificate Management
item1.desc: Full lifecycle certificate management, automation, and publishing.

item2.title: Privileged Remote Access
item2.desc: VPN-less granular remote access for your employees, vendors, and third parties.

item3.title: Personal Password Manager
item3.desc: Securely store all of your personal passwords and sensitive data.

item4.title: Privileged Infrastructure
item4.desc: Appliance-based scalable high-availability infrastructure for heightened security.

cta.title: 360º Privilege Platform
cta.desc: A comprehensive, extensible platform that lets you ensure least privilege best practices and improve your security posture across the enterprise with the lowest cost of ownership and fastest deployment in the industry.

deployment.title: Deployment and Consulting
deployment.desc: We and our partners offer professional services for the deployment of our solutions, including initial setup, customization, and consulting.

solutionCenter.title: Solution Center
solutionCenter.desc: We offer award-winning support to all our customers. Find out about our support services and resources and how to contact our support here.

training.title: Training
training.desc: Access guidelines, documentation, and videos to better understand our products and services on our e-learning portal.

seePartners.title: See our Partners

overview.title: The Complete Identity Security Platform
overview.subtitle: Fast. Simple. Secure. Everything you need to control privileged access.
overview.description: Segura® stops privileged attacks before they happen — without slowing you down. Our all-in-one solution secures human and machine identities, so you stay ✔ in compliance, ✔ in control, and ✔ ahead of threats.

items.question: All-In-One solution
items.answer: Everything you need for privileged access management in a single, powerful platform. No extra tools, no complexity—just complete protection.

items.question: No Hidden Costs
items.answer: Transparent pricing with everything included. Predictable pricing, full features included, and no surprise fees.

items.question: 7 Minutes To Deploy
items.answer: Transparent pricing with everything included. Predictable pricing, full features included, and no surprise fees.

items.question: Top-Rated Support
items.answer: 98% of users recommend us, and our expert team is always ready to help. Instead of frustrating delays, get real answers.

comparisonTable.title: Why More Teams Are Choosing Segura®
comparisonTable.description:
We've heard the same story again and again: long deployments, missing features, and tools that never quite fit.

Unlike legacy solutions, Segura® fits into modern infrastructure without slowing you down.

badges.title: A Quality PAM Solution and Support
badges.quote:
"Segura® has been a great solution for us. We use it on daily basis and we are sure our organization is safer with it.

The standout feature of Segura® for me is that it is intuitive and has a user-friendly interface.

The exceptional customer support provided by Segura® has also been a key factor in our satisfaction with the product."
